coverage.name: Coverage of perspectives
coverage.comparison_text: Coverage: four-llms-bitcoin-gemini 4/5 vs four-llms-bitcoin-openai 2/5. only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini addresses stakeholders, uncertainty. only four-llms-bitcoin-openai fires FVS-001 Frame Amplification, FVS-015 Efficiency Frame.

calibration.name: Claim calibration
calibration.comparison_text: Hedge ratio: four-llms-bitcoin-gemini 0.12 (8 claims) vs four-llms-bitcoin-openai 0.00 (11 claims). only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini fires FVS-012 Uncertainty Frame.

robustness.name: Robustness
robustness.comparison_text: Neither peer had claims checked against external sources.

counterfactual.name: Counterfactual thinking
counterfactual.comparison_text: Both peers engage with counterfactual thinking. only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini fires FVS-012 Uncertainty Frame; only four-llms-bitcoin-openai fires FVS-001 Frame Amplification.

narrative:
Where four-llms-bitcoin-gemini and four-llms-bitcoin-openai differ structurally:
  - Coverage of perspectives: Coverage: four-llms-bitcoin-gemini 4/5 vs four-llms-bitcoin-openai 2/5. only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini addresses stakeholders, uncertainty. only four-llms-bitcoin-openai fires FVS-001 Frame Amplification, FVS-015 Efficiency Frame.
  - Claim calibration: Hedge ratio: four-llms-bitcoin-gemini 0.12 (8 claims) vs four-llms-bitcoin-openai 0.00 (11 claims). only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini fires FVS-012 Uncertainty Frame.
  - Counterfactual thinking: Both peers engage with counterfactual thinking. only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini fires FVS-012 Uncertainty Frame; only four-llms-bitcoin-openai fires FVS-001 Frame Amplification.
